TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: softball nu Amuhuwan a kamu, u leciw nu Sakizaya a kamu. kakiliman mali (Anmuhuan a kamu: softball), nama kadaay kina pangciw, masasengiay tu. kina mali i 1996 mihcaan aolinpike nu mikaduba'an kina lingatu, nu tatayna a nipimaliÔľõnika 2008 mihcaan aolinpike tu nika duba'an tu nadikudan sa lawbesan. . nu kitaki a mali tu mikelitay atu kitaki nu mipangciway a mikelitay pakumuden nu heni kina mali atu pangciw masacacay ku mamaliyan, a i 2020 mihcaan nu aoyun. nama 2014 mihcaan na izaw kya yayun nu pangciw atu mali masacacayay a nipimali. IOC tu 2011 mihcaan tu pituay a bulad izaw ku limaay a demiad misapinang kina pangciw atu mali mala 2020 mihcaan nu aoyun u papilian a sapimali. kina mali hananay caay kaw matenesay a nipimali, sisa caay kalalucek a mimali. nilacul
S.PHON: softbar~…ĺr~…ĺ nu amuńßuwan a kamu, u r~…ĺ…ô ¶iw nu sakizaja a kamu. kakir~…ĺiman mar~…ĺi (anmuńßuan a kamu: softbar~…ĺr~…ĺ), nama kadaaj kina paŇč ¶iw, masas…ôŇčiaj tu. kina mar~…ĺi i **** mińß ¶aan aor~…ĺinpik…ô nu mikaduba Ē~ °an kina r~…ĺiŇčatu, nu tatajna a nipimar~…ĺi*nika **** mińß ¶aan aor~…ĺinpik…ô tu nika duba Ē~ °an tu nadikudan sa r~…ĺawb…ôsan. . nu kitaki a mar~…ĺi tu mik…ôr~…ĺitaj atu kitaki nu mipaŇč ¶iwaj a mik…ôr~…ĺitaj pakumud…ôn nu ńß…ôni kina mar~…ĺi atu paŇč ¶iw masa ¶a ¶aj ku mamar~…ĺijan, a i **** mińß ¶aan nu aojun. nama **** mińß ¶aan na izaw kja jajun nu paŇč ¶iw atu mar~…ĺi masa ¶a ¶ajaj a nipimar~…ĺi. io ¶ tu **** mińß ¶aan tu pituaj a bur~…ĺad izaw ku r~…ĺimaaj a d…ômiad misapinaŇč kina paŇč ¶iw atu mar~…ĺi mar~…ĺa **** mińß ¶aan nu aojun u papir~…ĺian a sapimar~…ĺi. kina mar~…ĺi ńßananaj ¶aaj kaw mat…ôn…ôsaj a nipimar~…ĺi, sisa ¶aaj kar~…ĺar~…ĺu ¶…ôk a mimar~…ĺi. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ
S.FORM: softball nu Amuhuwan a kamu, u leciw nu Sakizaya a kamu. kakiliman mali (Anmuhuan a kamu: softball), nama kadaay kina pangciw, masasengiay tu. kina mali i 1996 mihcaan aolinpike nu mikaduba'an kina lingatu, nu tatayna a nipimaliÔľõnika 2008 mihcaan aolinpike tu nika duba'an tu nadikudan sa lawbesan. . nu kitaki a mali tu mikelitay atu kitaki nu mipangciway a mikelitay pakumuden nu heni kina mali atu pangciw masacacay ku mamaliyan, a i 2020 mihcaan nu aoyun. nama 2014 mihcaan na izaw kya yayun nu pangciw atu mali masacacayay a nipimali. IOC tu 2011 mihcaan tu pituay a bulad izaw ku limaay a demiad misapinang kina pangciw atu mali mala 2020 mihcaan nu aoyun u papilian a sapimali. kina mali hananay caay kaw matenesay a nipimali, sisa caay kalalucek a mimali. nilacul
S.PHON: softbar~…ĺr~…ĺ nu amuńßuwan a kamu, u r~…ĺ…ô ¶iw nu sakizaja a kamu. kakir~…ĺiman mar~…ĺi (anmuńßuan a kamu: softbar~…ĺr~…ĺ), nama kadaaj kina paŇč ¶iw, masas…ôŇčiaj tu. kina mar~…ĺi i **** mińß ¶aan aor~…ĺinpik…ô nu mikaduba Ē~ °an kina r~…ĺiŇčatu, nu tatajna a nipimar~…ĺi*nika **** mińß ¶aan aor~…ĺinpik…ô tu nika duba Ē~ °an tu nadikudan sa r~…ĺawb…ôsan. . nu kitaki a mar~…ĺi tu mik…ôr~…ĺitaj atu kitaki nu mipaŇč ¶iwaj a mik…ôr~…ĺitaj pakumud…ôn nu ńß…ôni kina mar~…ĺi atu paŇč ¶iw masa ¶a ¶aj ku mamar~…ĺijan, a i **** mińß ¶aan nu aojun. nama **** mińß ¶aan na izaw kja jajun nu paŇč ¶iw atu mar~…ĺi masa ¶a ¶ajaj a nipimar~…ĺi. io ¶ tu **** mińß ¶aan tu pituaj a bur~…ĺad izaw ku r~…ĺimaaj a d…ômiad misapinaŇč kina paŇč ¶iw atu mar~…ĺi mar~…ĺa **** mińß ¶aan nu aojun u papir~…ĺian a sapimar~…ĺi. kina mar~…ĺi ńßananaj ¶aaj kaw mat…ôn…ôsaj a nipimar~…ĺi, sisa ¶aaj kar~…ĺar~…ĺu ¶…ôk a mimar~…ĺi. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ
